title.default: Zenda — AI Receptionist for Your Business

metadata.description: Multilingual AI receptionist that handles appointments, reminders, and customer conversations via WhatsApp. Built for businesses in Latin America.

openGraph.title: Zenda — AI Receptionist for Your Business
openGraph.description: Your AI receptionist that never misses a message. Handles customer conversations, appointments, and reminders via WhatsApp.

twitter.title: Zenda — AI Receptionist
twitter.description: AI receptionist that handles appointments and customer conversations via WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: AI receptionist for appointment-based businesses in Latin America. Available 24/7 on WhatsApp.

home.heroDesc: Zenda handles customer conversations, books appointments, and sends reminders — all through WhatsApp. Built for businesses in Latin America.
home.audiencesDesc: Whether you run a salon, clinic, or studio — Zenda adapts to your business.
home.audienceBeautyDesc: Haircuts, manicures, treatments — all booked via WhatsApp.
home.audienceWellnessDesc: Massages, facials, and wellness sessions automated end to end.
home.audienceHealthDesc: Patient scheduling, reminders, and follow-ups handled 24/7.
home.audienceOtherDesc: Dentists, gyms, consultants — any appointment-based business.
home.capabilitiesTitle: Everything you need to stop missing appointments
home.capabilitiesDesc: From first message to confirmed appointment, Zenda handles it all.
home.capAiDesc: Handles customer messages naturally in 9 languages (English, Spanish, French, German, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Russian, Arabic), 24/7. Understands context and intent.
home.capSchedulingDesc: Books, confirms, reschedules, and cancels appointments automatically based on your real availability.
home.capRemindersDesc: 24-hour and 2-hour reminders sent via WhatsApp. Reduce no-shows by up to 40%.
home.capLearningDesc: Trains on your services, hours, policies, and FAQ. Gets smarter with every conversation.
home.capTakeoverDesc: You or your staff can step in anytime with one click. Seamless handoff back to AI.
home.capWhatsappDesc: Your customers chat via WhatsApp — no app to install, no friction. Just their usual messaging app.
home.featureChatDesc: Your AI receptionist greets customers, answers questions about services and pricing, and guides them to book — all in natural, friendly language.
home.featureCalendarDesc: When a customer wants an appointment, Zenda checks your availability, proposes times, and confirms the booking. Reschedules and cancellations too.
home.featureSettingsDesc: Add your services, hours, policies, and FAQ to the knowledge base. The AI uses this to give accurate, personalized responses to every customer.
home.featureSafetyDesc: Built-in safeguards ensure messages comply with WhatsApp business policies. Opt-in management, sending limits, and audit trails keep you protected.
home.safetyDesc: Every message is consent-aware, rate-limited, and policy-compliant out of the box.
home.safetyConsentDesc: Every customer must opt in before receiving messages. Easy opt-out at any time.
home.safetyLimitsDesc: Maximum 3 outbound messages without a customer reply. Prevents spam and protects your reputation.
home.safetyAuditDesc: Every message is logged with purpose, timestamp, and consent status. Full transparency.
home.safetyGuardrailsDesc: AI responses are filtered for appropriate content and compliant with messaging policies.
home.step1Desc: Link your business WhatsApp number in seconds via the Zenda desktop app. Scan a QR code and you're live.
home.step2Desc: Tell Zenda about your services, hours, staff, and policies. Takes about 5 minutes.
home.step3Desc: Zenda starts handling customer messages and booking appointments immediately. Monitor everything from your dashboard.
home.dashboardDesc: Monitor conversations, appointments, and customer activity from a single dashboard.
home.vcChat1: Hi! I'd love to help you book an appointment. What service are you looking for?
home.vcChat2: I need a haircut and maybe a beard trim
home.vcChat3: Great choice! I have openings tomorrow at 10am and 2pm. Which works better for you?
home.vcKb1A: Yes, all major cards and cash.
home.ctaDesc: Get started in 5 minutes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
home.pricingTeaser: Plans starting at {price}/month. 14-day free trial included.
home.faq1Q: Do my customers need to install anything?
home.faq1A: No. They just message your WhatsApp number as usual. Zenda works behind the scenes — no downloads, no sign-ups required.
home.faq2Q: Can I take over a conversation manually?
home.faq2A: Yes. One click to take over from the dashboard, one click to hand back to AI. Full control, always.
home.faq3A: Zenda supports 9 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Russian, and Arabic. The AI auto-detects which language the customer is using.
home.faq4A: All conversations are encrypted. Your data stays in your workspace. We never share it with third parties.
home.faq5A: Yes, no contracts. Cancel from the dashboard or billing portal at any time. Your data is yours to export.
home.faq6Q: What if the AI makes a mistake?
home.faq6A: You can take over any conversation at any time. The AI is designed to escalate to you when unsure. You can also cancel or reschedule any appointment from the calendar.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.desc: No per-message fees. No surprises. Cancel anytime.
pricing.starterDesc: For small businesses automating appointment conversations
pricing.proDesc: For businesses depending on WhatsApp for scheduling
pricing.businessDesc: For high-touch businesses with heavier scheduling needs
pricing.faq1A: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade from the dashboard. Changes take effect immediately.
pricing.faq2A: Yes! Every plan includes a 14-day free trial. No credit card required — just sign up and start using Zenda immediately.
pricing.faq3Q: What happens if I exceed my limits?
pricing.faq3A: We'll notify you before you hit limits. You can upgrade or wait until the next cycle.
pricing.foundingBanner: Limited time: 50% off your first 3 months as a founding member.
pricing.freeDesc: Try Zenda with up to 25 monthly contacts

docs.title: Documentation
docs.desc: Everything you need to get your AI receptionist up and running.
docs.step1P1: Sign up at {link} with your name, email, and a password. No credit card required — you get a 14-day free trial.
docs.step1P2: After signing up, you'll be guided to download the desktop app for macOS or Windows.
docs.step2P1: Open the Zenda desktop app and log in. You'll see a WhatsApp connection screen with a QR code.
docs.step2Li3: Scan the QR code shown in Zenda
docs.step2P2: Your WhatsApp is now linked. Customers who message your number will interact with your AI receptionist.
docs.step3Title: Step 3: Set Up Your Business Profile
docs.step3P1: The onboarding chat will walk you through configuring your business. You'll set up:
docs.step3Li2: {strong} — name, duration, and optional price for each service
docs.step3Li3: {strong} — your availability per day of the week
docs.step3Li5: {strong} — name, tone (professional, warm, friendly), and greeting
docs.step3P2: This takes about 5 minutes. You can always change these later from Settings.
docs.step4P1: Once setup is complete, your AI receptionist starts handling customer messages immediately. Try sending a test message to your own WhatsApp number to see it in action.
docs.convAutoDesc: By default, all conversations are in {strong}. Your AI receptionist handles the entire conversation: greeting, answering questions, checking availability, and booking appointments.
docs.convTakeoverP1: Click {strong} on any conversation to switch from AI to manual mode. You can type directly to the customer through the dashboard. When you're done, click {strong2} to hand the conversation back to the AI.
docs.convTakeoverP2: The AI will also automatically escalate to you when it encounters something it can't handle (complaints, refund requests, unusual questions).
docs.convAttentionDesc: When the AI escalates, the conversation shows an orange "Needs Attention" badge. You'll see a notification in the top bar. Click the conversation to review what happened and decide whether to take over or let the AI continue.
docs.customReceptionistLi2: {strong} — Professional, Warm, Friendly, Elegant, or Casual
docs.customKbP1: Go to {strong} to add frequently asked questions and answers. This teaches your AI about things specific to your business:
docs.customKbLi1: "Do you accept credit cards?" → "Yes, we accept all major credit cards and cash."
docs.customKbLi2: "Is there parking?" → "Free street parking is available on weekdays."
docs.customKbLi3: "Do you offer group discounts?" → "Groups of 5+ get 10% off."
docs.customKbP2: The more you add, the smarter your AI becomes at handling customer questions.
docs.billingTrial: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
docs.billingStarterDesc: 200 active contacts, 2 staff schedules, day-before + same-day reminders
docs.billingProDesc: 600 active contacts, 5 staff, 2 locations, priority support
docs.billingBusinessDesc: 1,200 active contacts, 10 staff, 3 locations, assisted setup
docs.billingCancel: Cancel anytime from Settings. No contracts, no hidden fees. {link}.
docs.faq1Q: Do my customers need to install anything?
docs.faq1A: No. They message your WhatsApp number as usual. Zenda works behind the scenes.
docs.faq2Q: What languages does the AI support?
docs.faq2A: 9 languages: English, Spanish, French, Arabic, German, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, and Korean. The AI automatically detects which language the customer is using and responds in kind.
docs.faq3Q: Can I still use WhatsApp normally?
docs.faq3A: Yes. When you take over a conversation, you type directly through Zenda. Your phone's WhatsApp continues to work normally for personal chats.
docs.faq4Q: What happens if the AI makes a mistake?
docs.faq4A: You can take over any conversation at any time. The AI is designed to escalate to you when unsure. You can also cancel or reschedule any appointment from the Calendar.

verticals.ctaDesc: Start your 14-day free trial today. No credit card required.

wellness.description: Massage, yoga, acupuncture — Zenda manages your bookings and client communication while you focus on what matters.

clinics.metaDesc: Automate appointment scheduling for your dental, medical, or health clinic with an AI receptionist via WhatsApp.
clinics.title: Health Clinics
clinics.headline: AI Receptionist for Health Clinics
clinics.description: Dental, medical, and health clinics trust Zenda to handle scheduling, patient reminders, and intake questions — all via WhatsApp.
clinics.feature1Desc: AI handles new bookings, follow-ups, and cancellations 24/7. No more missed calls during consultations.
clinics.feature2Desc: Automatic 24h and 2h WhatsApp reminders. Reduce no-shows by up to 40% without lifting a finger.
clinics.feature3Desc: AI answers common questions about services, hours, insurance, and preparation instructions.
clinics.feature4Desc: 9 languages including English, Spanish, French, German, and more. Serve a diverse clientele without extra reception staff.
clinics.feature5Desc: All conversations are encrypted. Workspace-isolated data with full audit trails.
clinics.feature6Desc: Define custom intake forms, appointment types, and escalation rules to match your clinic's processes.

fitness.metaTitle: AI Receptionist for Fitness Studios — Zenda
fitness.metaDesc: Automate class bookings and member scheduling for your fitness studio or gym with an AI receptionist via WhatsApp.
fitness.title: Fitness Studios
fitness.headline: AI Receptionist for Fitness Studios
fitness.description: Gyms, yoga studios, and fitness centers use Zenda to book classes, manage memberships, and reduce no-shows — all through WhatsApp.
fitness.feature1Desc: Members book yoga, HIIT, CrossFit, and more by texting your WhatsApp. No app needed.
fitness.feature2Desc: 24h and 2h WhatsApp reminders. Reduce class no-shows by up to 40% and keep your schedule full.
fitness.feature3Desc: AI handles trial bookings, membership questions, and renewal reminders automatically.
fitness.feature4Desc: Full classes? AI manages waitlists and auto-fills spots when someone cancels.
fitness.feature5Desc: 9 languages including English, Spanish, French, German, and more. Serve diverse member populations without additional front-desk staff.
fitness.feature6Desc: Step in anytime. Seamless handoff back to AI when you are done.

dental.metaTitle: AI Receptionist for Dental Clinics — Zenda
dental.metaDesc: Automate appointment scheduling for your dental clinic with an AI receptionist via WhatsApp. Reduce cancellations by 40%.
dental.title: Dental Clinics
dental.headline: AI Receptionist for Dental Clinics
dental.description: Dental clinics trust Zenda to handle patient scheduling, reduce cancellations by 40%, and fill last-minute openings — all via WhatsApp.
dental.feature1Desc: AI handles cleanings, fillings, orthodontics, and emergency bookings 24/7. No more missed calls during procedures.
dental.feature2Desc: When a patient cancels, AI instantly contacts your waitlist to fill the gap. Recover up to $2,000/month in lost revenue.
dental.feature3Desc: 24h and 2h WhatsApp reminders with preparation instructions. Reduce no-shows by up to 40%.
dental.feature4Desc: AI knows procedure durations and requirements. Books the right time slot for cleanings, root canals, or implants.
dental.feature5Desc: 9 languages including English, Spanish, French, German, and more. Serve diverse patient populations without additional front-desk staff.
dental.feature6Desc: All conversations are encrypted with full audit trails. Compliant messaging out of the box.

download.sentDesc: Check your inbox. We'll also notify you when new versions are released.

download.step3Desc: The chat wizard walks you through services, hours, and policies in 5 minutes.

gettingStarted.title: Quick Start Guide
gettingStarted.desc: From download to your first AI conversation in under 15 minutes.
gettingStarted.step1Desc: Get the desktop app for your platform. Available for macOS (.dmg) and Windows (.exe).
gettingStarted.step2Desc: Scan the QR code with your phone to link your business number. Takes 30 seconds.
gettingStarted.step3Desc: The chat wizard walks you through your business name, services, hours, and policies in about 5 minutes.
gettingStarted.step4Desc: Give your receptionist a name, choose a tone, and set a greeting. The AI starts learning your business immediately.
gettingStarted.step5Desc: Your AI receptionist is live! Send a test message to your own number to see it in action.
gettingStarted.tip1: Add common Q&A to your Knowledge Base to make the AI smarter about your business.
gettingStarted.tip2: You can switch between AI and manual mode on any conversation with one click.
gettingStarted.tip3: The AI detects language automatically — your customers get responses in their own language.
gettingStarted.helpDesc: Check out our full documentation for detailed guides, FAQs, and troubleshooting.
gettingStarted.offer3: Multilingual AI (9 languages) included on all plans

earlyAccess.title: Be first in line
earlyAccess.desc: Join the waitlist for exclusive founding member pricing. Limited spots available.
earlyAccess.successDesc: We'll reach out to {email} when it's your turn. Founding members get special pricing.

founding.metaDesc: Join Zenda as a founding customer. 14-day free trial + 50% off your first 3 months. AI WhatsApp receptionist for your business.
founding.heroSubtitle: Be among the first 100 businesses to automate your WhatsApp appointments with AI. Get exclusive founding pricing.
founding.feature1Desc: Answers every message, books appointments, sends reminders — 24/7 in 9 languages.
founding.feature2Desc: Try Zenda risk-free for 14 days. No credit card required until you're ready.
founding.feature3Desc: Founding customers get half-price for the first quarter. Lock in savings forever.
founding.feature4Desc: Direct WhatsApp line to our team. We'll help you set up everything.
founding.feature5Desc: Your feedback directly shapes new features. We build what you need.
founding.step1Desc: Create your account and connect your WhatsApp Business number.
founding.step2Desc: Set your services, hours, and booking rules. Our AI learns your business.
founding.step3Desc: Your AI receptionist handles appointments while you focus on your clients.
founding.ctaSubtext: No credit card required for trial. Cancel anytime.
founding.benefit1: 14-day free trial — no credit card required
founding.offer1: AI WhatsApp receptionist that answers every message 24/7
founding.offer2: Automatic appointment booking, reminders, and cancellations
founding.offer3: Multilingual AI (9 languages) included on all plans
founding.offer4: Desktop app for macOS and Windows to manage everything
founding.testimonial1: "Zenda handles 90% of our appointment messages. I save 2 hours every day."
founding.faq1A: You choose a plan that fits your business. Solo starts at $29/mo. With founding pricing, that's under $15/mo for 3 months.
founding.faq2Q: Do I need to change my WhatsApp number?
founding.faq2A: No. Zenda works with your existing WhatsApp Business number.
founding.faq3Q: How is this different from chatbots?
founding.faq3A: Zenda is an AI receptionist — it understands context, handles complex scheduling, and knows your business. It's not a scripted bot.
founding.faq4A: Yes. No contracts, no cancellation fees. You can cancel from your dashboard or by messaging us.
founding.errorPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
founding.successBody: Your 14-day free trial has started. Download the desktop app to set up your AI receptionist and connect your WhatsApp. You also received 50% off for 3 months as a founding customer.
founding.formDisclaimer: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Your 14-day trial starts immediately.
founding.demoSubtitle: A client texts on WhatsApp and the AI books the appointment automatically — in 1 minute
founding.demoMsg1: Hi! I'd like to book a haircut appointment
founding.demoMsg2:
Hi María! 👋 I'll help you right away.

For a haircut, we have availability:

📅 Today 3:00 PM with Carlos
📅 Tomorrow 11:00 AM with Laura

Which do you prefer?
founding.demoMsg4:
✅ Done! Your appointment:

💇 Haircut
👤 Carlos
📅 Today, 3:00 PM
📍 Beauty Studio

I'll send you a reminder 2 hours before.
